text.title: Terraform IaC Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: skip-this-methodology — single workspace, 'terraform' methodology covers it
split by env: dev / staging / prod workspaces
split by (env, layer); cross-ref via remote_state

example.note: How many envs and layers? → matches branch "envs == 1 AND layers == 1" → conclusion ref=r1-workspace-per-env-layer
